missing: chrome-cdp: CDP endpoint is not reachable
playwright-mcp: playwright-mcp CLI path could not be resolved
llm-api-key: No supported LLM API key found in environment

runtimeRows.remediation: Start Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and set OPENCHROME_BENCH_CDP_ENDPOINT if using a different endpoint.

runtimeRows.evidence: playwright-mcp CLI path could not be resolved
runtimeRows.remediation: Install @playwright/mcp or set PLAYWRIGHT_MCP_SERVER_PATH to its cli.js path.

runtimeRows.evidence: No supported LLM API key found in environment
runtimeRows.remediation: Export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY before running live LLM benchmark loops.

perLibrary.note: OpenChrome MCP server driven by Claude tool-calling. Existing claude-adapter.ts.
External @playwright/mcp server; benchmark rows must use PlaywrightMcpAdapter and may emit dependency-only setup errors.
External browser-use Python agent/bridge; rows must use BrowserUseAdapter and keep passive-tool rows secondary.
